name: Mahyar Ayyar
overview: During the Safavid era, Mahyar, a brave and skilled bandit, is trapped because of his robberies. Before the execution, he only wants to meet his mother one last time. Chivalry saves Mahyar's life through his intervention and this event changes his life. Under the influence of the world of great kindness, Mahyar changes his life path and steps into Ayari. By helping the oppressed and fighting the oppressors, he becomes a symbol of chivalry and courage.

trailers.title: قسمت 1 سریال جدید تاریخی و درام مهیارعیار با بازی کامران تفتی، بهنام تشکر و متین ستوده
